notes:
Multiple ways to solve this:
1. Brute Force - Nested for loops. TC = O(n^2). SC =  O(1)
2. Sorting. TC = O(n.logn). SC = O(1) / O(n) as per the sorting algorithm.
3. Hash Set - Add every unseen element to hash set, if an element already exists, return true.
4. Hash Set Length (BEST) - Initialize hash set with all given elements and compare sizes.
TC, SC both O(n) for both hash methods.
